tests.name: generateCubeLattice returns correct unique vertex count for NxNxN grid ((N+1)^3)
tests.description: A 3x3x3 grid should produce (3+1)^3 = 64 unique vertices, 4x4x4 = 125, etc. Verifies shared vertex merging at cube boundaries.

tests.name: generateCubeLattice returns correct merged edge count (3*N*(N+1)^2)
tests.description: Total unique edges in an NxNxN grid = 3*N*(N+1)^2. Shared edges between adjacent cubes are not duplicated.

tests.name: vertex positions array length equals vertexCount * 3
tests.description: The vertex positions Float32Array should have exactly vertexCount * 3 elements (x, y, z per vertex).

tests.name: vertex aRandom array length equals vertexCount * 3
tests.description: The per-vertex random attribute array should match vertexCount * 3.

tests.name: edge positions array length equals edgeCount * 2 * 3
tests.description: Edge data is in LineSegments format: each edge has 2 vertices, each vertex has 3 floats.

tests.name: edge randoms array length equals edgeCount * 2 * 3
tests.description: Per-edge-vertex random values follow the same sizing as edge positions.

tests.name: all vertex positions are finite
tests.description: No NaN or Infinity values in vertex position data.
assertions: every value in positions is Number.isFinite

tests.name: all vertex aRandom values are finite and in [0, 1)
tests.description: Random attribute values are bounded in [0, 1) and finite.

tests.name: all edge position values are finite
tests.description: No NaN or Infinity in edge position data.
assertions: every value in edge positions is Number.isFinite

tests.name: all edge random values are finite and in [0, 1)
tests.description: Edge random attribute values bounded in [0, 1).
assertions: every edge random value >= 0 and < 1 and finite

tests.name: output arrays are Float32Array instances
tests.description: Both vertex and edge output arrays must be Float32Array for GPU buffer compatibility.

tests.name: generator is deterministic — same seed produces identical output
tests.description: Same seed + gridSize + cellSize always produces byte-identical position and random arrays.
assertions: two calls with same params produce identical vertexCount, edgeCount
two calls with same params produce identical positions arrays
two calls with same params produce identical aRandom arrays

tests.name: lattice is centered at origin
tests.description: The mean of all vertex positions should be approximately (0,0,0), indicating the lattice is centered.

tests.name: cellSize parameter controls spacing between vertices
tests.description: Doubling cellSize should roughly double the bounding extent of the lattice.
assertions: bounding extent with cellSize=2.0 is approximately double cellSize=1.0

tests.name: aRandom uses hashRandomFromPosition (matches helper output for known vertex)
tests.description: The random values for a known vertex position should match hashRandomFromPosition output.
assertions: aRandom for corner vertex matches hashRandomFromPosition(x,y,z)

tests.name: each cube in the lattice has 12 edges (verified by total edge formula)
tests.description: A single cube (1x1x1 grid) should produce exactly 12 edges and 8 vertices.

tests.name: init() adds THREE.LineSegments and THREE.Points to the scene
tests.description: The cube lattice system should create exactly one LineSegments (edges) and one Points (vertices) object.

tests.name: LineSegments geometry has position attribute with itemSize 3
tests.description: Edge geometry must have a position attribute with 3-component vectors.

tests.name: Points geometry has position attribute with itemSize 3
tests.description: Vertex geometry must have a position attribute with 3-component vectors.

tests.name: geometry has aRandom attribute with itemSize 3
tests.description: Both edge and vertex geometry need aRandom per-vertex attribute for shader randomization.
assertions: LineSegments geometry has aRandom with itemSize 3
Points geometry has aRandom with itemSize 3

tests.name: LineSegments use ShaderMaterial with vertex and fragment shaders
tests.description: Edges must use ShaderMaterial with non-empty vertex and fragment shader strings.

tests.name: material is transparent with AdditiveBlending and depthWrite disabled
tests.description: Visual blending config matches existing wireframe systems.

tests.name: material declares required audio-reactive uniforms
tests.description: All standard wireframe uniforms must be present for shader compatibility.

tests.name: draw() updates uTime uniform to reflect frame elapsed time
tests.description: Time uniform must be updated each frame for animation.
assertions: after draw with elapsed=200, uTime.value is 200

tests.name: draw() updates uBassEnergy uniform from frame params
tests.description: Bass energy drives macro warp displacement per acceptance criteria.

tests.name: draw() updates uTrebleEnergy uniform from frame params
tests.description: Treble energy drives vertex jitter per acceptance criteria.

tests.name: draw() does not throw with valid FrameState
tests.description: Normal render loop should not throw.
assertions: draw() with default frame does not throw

tests.name: draw() does not throw with edge-case params (zero bass, zero treble, no pointer)
tests.description: System must handle zero audio and no pointer input gracefully.
assertions: draw() with zero bass/treble and undefined pointer does not throw

tests.name: setOpacity updates uOpacity uniform on all materials
tests.description: Crossfade opacity must propagate to both edge and vertex materials.
assertions: setOpacity(0.5) sets uOpacity to 0.5 on LineSegments material
setOpacity(0.5) sets uOpacity to 0.5 on Points material
setOpacity(0) sets uOpacity to 0 on all materials

tests.name: cleanup() removes all objects from scene and disposes geometry/material
tests.description: Cleanup must fully teardown to prevent GPU memory leaks.
assertions: after cleanup, scene has no LineSegments
after cleanup, scene has no Points

tests.name: cleanup after init with no draws does not throw
tests.description: Early cleanup (before any draw calls) should be safe.
assertions: cleanup() does not throw when called immediately after init()

tests.name: same seed produces same geometry (deterministic init)
tests.description: Grid dimensions should be seeded per session per acceptance criteria.
assertions: two inits with same seed produce same LineSegments vertex count
two inits with same seed produce same Points vertex count

tests.name: multiple draw calls do not leak objects into the scene
tests.description: Repeated draw calls should only update uniforms, not add new objects.
assertions: scene.children.length is unchanged after 10 draw calls

tests.name: all uniform values remain finite after draw with extreme audio params
tests.description: No NaN/Infinity in uniforms even with max bass/treble/motion values.
assertions: all numeric uniform values are Number.isFinite after extreme params draw

tests.name: vertex shader includes noise3d declarations (snoise or fbm3 symbols)
tests.description: Reused wireframe shaders should include noise functions for displacement.

tests.name: vertex shader declares fog-related varying (vFogFactor)
tests.description: Fog depth attenuation must be plumbed through the vertex shader.

tests.name: fragment shader receives vFogFactor for depth fog
tests.description: Fragment shader must use vFogFactor for consistent depth fog.

tests.name: config noiseOctaves is passed to uNoiseOctaves uniform
tests.description: Quality tier noise octave setting must propagate to shader uniform.
assertions: creating with noiseOctaves=1 sets uNoiseOctaves.value to 1

tests.name: config enablePointerRepulsion is passed to uEnablePointerRepulsion uniform
tests.description: Pointer repulsion toggle must propagate to shader.

tests.name: config enableSlowModulation is passed to uEnableSlowModulation uniform
tests.description: Slow modulation toggle must propagate to shader.

tests.name: QualityProfile includes latticeGridSize field
tests.description: The quality profile must expose lattice grid dimensions.

tests.name: QualityProfile includes latticeCellSize field
tests.description: The quality profile must expose lattice cell spacing.

tests.name: latticeGridSize per tier: low=3, medium=5, high=7
tests.description: Grid size adapts to quality tier per plan.

tests.name: latticeCellSize per tier: low=1.2, medium=1.0, high=0.8
tests.description: Cell size inversely correlates with tier for denser grids at higher quality.

tests.name: latticeGridSize scales with tier (low < medium < high)
tests.description: Grid size monotonically increases across quality tiers.

tests.name: extractSystemConfig returns correct config for cubelattice
tests.description: The cubelattice config must extract gridSize, cellSize, and shared quality fields.

tests.name: extractSystemConfig covers cubelattice system name without throwing
tests.description: The system name 'cubelattice' must be recognized by extractSystemConfig.

tests.name: COMPOUND_MODE_DEFS includes pointcloud+cubelattice compound mode
tests.description: A compound mode combining pointcloud and cubelattice must be defined.
assertions: pointcloud is primary layer, cubelattice is secondary

tests.name: primaryCountForSystem returns gridSize for cubelattice
tests.description: The primaryCountForSystem switch must handle 'cubelattice' and return gridSize.
assertions: buildCompoundEntries produces entry with maxPoints > 0 for pointcloud+cubelattice

tests.name: scaleQualityProfile scales latticeGridSize with clamping
tests.description: Lattice grid size should scale with quality factor and clamp to minimum viable value.
assertions: scaled latticeGridSize <= original latticeGridSize when factor < 1

tests.name: no localStorage or cookie access during cube lattice init/draw operations
tests.description: Privacy compliance — no forbidden storage APIs used.

tests.name: LineSegments vertex count is even (valid line pairs)
tests.description: LineSegments requires pairs of vertices — count must be even.

tests.name: draw updates uniforms on ALL materials (edges and vertices)
tests.description: Both edge LineSegments and vertex Points materials must receive uniform updates.
assertions: LineSegments material uBassEnergy updated after draw
Points material uBassEnergy updated after draw
LineSegments material uTime updated after draw
Points material uTime updated after draw

tests.name: boundary values (density=0/1, structureComplexity=0/1) do not throw
tests.description: Edge-case visual params should not cause errors.
assertions: init + draw with density=0, structureComplexity=0 does not throw
init + draw with density=1, structureComplexity=1 does not throw

tests.name: gridSize config controls vertex count in resulting geometry
tests.description: Larger gridSize should produce more vertices in the Points geometry.
assertions: gridSize=3 Points vertex count < gridSize=5 Points vertex count

tests.name: paletteHue uniform reflects param on draw
tests.description: Palette hue must be passed through for coloring.

tests.name: motionAmplitude uniform reflects param on draw
tests.description: Motion amplitude controls displacement scale.
assertions: uMotionAmplitude with motionAmplitude=0.2 < uMotionAmplitude with motionAmplitude=1.0

tests.name: COMPOUND_MODE_DEFS count increases to 4 after adding cubelattice mode
tests.description: Adding the new compound mode should increase the total from 3 to 4.

tests.name: buildCompoundEntries returns 4 entries on medium tier (including cubelattice mode)
tests.description: The cubelattice compound mode should appear in medium tier compound entries.
assertions: buildCompoundEntries returns 4 entries on medium tier

tests.name: buildCompoundEntries still returns 0 entries on low tier
tests.description: Low tier should still skip all compound modes including the new one.
assertions: buildCompoundEntries returns 0 entries on low tier
